name: grid_16
prompt: A 4x4 grid of cute western cartoon game item icons on clean WHITE BACKGROUND, illustration style, adorable cartoon characters, kawaii style, vibrant cute colors. ABSOLUTELY NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO WORDS, NO NUMBERS anywhere. NO TEXT LABELS. ICONS ONLY. NO BLACK BORDERS, NO GRID LINES. Image size: 1024x1024, square canvas. Row 1: gold coin, gold coin, gold coin, gold coin. Row 2: fossil, fossil, fossil, fossil. Row 3: dragon egg, dragon egg, dragon egg, dragon egg fragment. Row 4: tool, tool, tool, device. Pure icons only, white background, cute cartoon graphics without any text.
